goal: Redesign the main menu navigation buttons using the horizontal 'Bamboo Slip' style (Option A).
constraints: Follow V9 Mineral Aesthetic (Ivory, Gold, Cinnabar, Ink Black).
Replace old vertical button images with a code-driven horizontal 'Slip' button design.
Include clear calligraphy-style text (Serif/Kaiti) for each action.
Use JixiaIcons for each button (Start, Story, Characters, Collection).
Maintain the layout balance with the new V9 cover background.
deliverables: Updated MainMenu.tsx with SlotButton component and new layout.
CSS/Tailwind styles for the 'Bamboo Slip' effect (mineral noise, gold border).
